title: Chicky's Fester Forest
description: A spooky, forest-themed post-vanilla dimension mod full of loot and mysterious structures to explore!
body:
### Chicky's Fester Forest

**Chicky's Fester Forest is a dimension mod intended to supply post-endgame content to the vanilla game. I have given an extensive emphasis on creating your perfect build - baubles, custom weapons, and custom armor let you create your ideal loadout. There are countless structures to explore and many mobs to fight, so suit up and get ready!**

_Dependent on: Curios API, GeckoLib, and ExpandAbility_

## NEW UPDATE! Welcome to the Ocean Update!

This new update features a massive overhaul of the ocean biome, featuring a new miniboss, new mobs, a bunch of new structures, and new items to add to your loadouts! Explore a newly revamped dimension, full of bug fixes and helpful balance changes in my largest update yet!
